reason: X is more subject-distinctive with its diver-tide/weather bar, seller profile, and warm-gradient fulfillment pipeline plus a polished mobile layout, while Y is a competent but more generic corporate-blue dashboard.

X delivers a cohesive ocean-teal identity with thoughtful subject details (wave logo, tide/weather chip) and a cleanly restacked 390px layout, while Y's brush-font headings sit on otherwise generic gray cards with unbalanced desktop whitespace and a messy wrapped mobile header.

X pairs stronger subject-specific detail (weather/tide 출항 정보, seller identity, colored fulfillment-pipeline bar) with a clean teal-navy palette and a flawless mobile layout, whereas Y's mobile clips today's revenue, chart labels, and top-5 sales counts at the right edge.

X adapts cleanly at 390px with distinctive Jeju touches (tide/weather badge, haenyeo greeting), while Y keeps its desktop sidebar on mobile so numbers, chart bars, and card content clip off the right edge.
